collection.title: 1. Data Collection
collection.intro: At GolMetrik AI, we collect the following data to improve user experience:
items: **Account Information:** Email address and password (stored encrypted)
**Usage Data:** App usage statistics, analysis history
**Device Information:** Device type, operating system version
**Payment Information:** Processed via Google Play, not stored by us

use.title: 2. Data Use
use.intro: We use the collected data for the following purposes:
items: Account management and authentication
Providing personalized analysis recommendations
Improving app performance
Detecting and resolving technical issues

security.title: 3. Data Security
security.intro: We use industry-standard security measures to protect your data:
items: Secure data transmission with SSL/TLS encryption
Storing passwords with secure hashing algorithms
Regular security audits
Access control and authorization

sharing.title: 4. Data Sharing
sharing.intro: We do not share your personal data with third parties, except in the following cases:
items: Legal obligations (court order, official request)
Service providers (infrastructure, analytics — anonymized data)
Explicit user consent

rights.title: 5. User Rights (GDPR)
rights.intro: Under data protection laws, you have the following rights:
items: Learn whether your personal data is being processed
Request access to your personal data
Request correction of inaccurate data
Request deletion of your data
Object to the transfer of your data to third parties

cookies.title: 6. Cookies
cookies.body: Our app uses cookies necessary for session management. These cookies are essential for the app to function properly.

children.title: 7. Children's Privacy
children.body: Our app is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from anyone under 13.

changes.title: 8. Changes
changes.body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will announce significant changes via in-app notifications.

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.body: For privacy-related questions, you can reach us at {{email}}.

deletion.title: 10. Account & Data Deletion
deletion.intro: If you want to delete your account and all associated data, you can use one of the following methods:
deletion.method2Suffix: you can submit a request from this page.
deletion.note: Note: If you have a Premium subscription, we recommend canceling it first via the Google Play Store.

service.title: 1. Service Description
service.body: GolMetrik AI is an informational platform that provides statistical analyses and predictions for football matches. Our app uses artificial intelligence and machine learning technologies to analyze match statistics.

conditions.title: 2. Terms of Use
conditions.intro: By using this app, you agree to the following terms:
items: You will use the app only for lawful purposes.
The analyses provided are for informational purposes only and do not constitute investment advice.
You are responsible for the security of your account.
You will not misuse the app or attempt reverse engineering.

disclaimer.title: 3. Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: GolMetrik AI does not guarantee the accuracy of the analyses provided. All predictions are based on statistical models, and actual results may vary. Users are entirely responsible for their own decisions.

premium.title: 4. Premium Membership
premium.body: By purchasing a Premium membership, you gain access to additional features. Subscriptions renew automatically, and cancellations must be made through your Google Play account.

ip.title: 5. Intellectual Property
ip.body: App content, design, and all materials belong to GolMetrik AI. Unauthorized copying, distribution, or modification is prohibited.

changes.title: 6. Changes
changes.body: We reserve the right to change these terms of use at any time. Significant changes will be announced via in-app notifications.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.body: For questions, you can reach us at {{email}}.
